steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The first sentence says the South Side Community Art Center has cultivated a multigenerational community of Black creatives since 1941. The second sentence says it has garnered a reputation as a hub of Black art and culture. The blank must connect these two sentences with the most logical relationship — the reputation is a result of the decades of cultivation.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘On the other hand,’: signals contrast; the second sentence doesn’t contradict the first. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘Nevertheless,’: also signals contrast or concession; no contradiction exists here. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘Periodically,’: means “from time to time” — a frequency marker that creates no logical connection between the two sentences. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘Accordingly,’: signals that what follows is a consequence of what came before — the center’s reputation follows naturally from its long history of cultivating Black creatives. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
